violations.message: campaign.preferred_template_family "olympus-typo" is not in the known set (olympus, limos, demeter, olympus-mv-single-step, olympus-mv-two-step, shop-single-step, shop-three-step). The build agent will still try to use it as a hint, but consider correcting the value if this is a typo.
"Landing" — upsell_template_pattern is set on a non-upsell page (type=landing). The hint is meaningful only on upsell pages; remove it or move it to an upsell page.
"Thank You" — upsell_template_pattern is set on a non-upsell page (type=thankyou). The hint is meaningful only on upsell pages; remove it or move it to an upsell page.

"Thank You" — upsell_template_pattern "wild_pattern" is not in the known set (mv, bundle_tier_pills, bundle_tier_cards, single). Build will use it as a hint, but confirm the value matches a template-family variant.
"Landing" — upsell_mv_tiers is set on a non-upsell page (type=landing). The hint is meaningful only on upsell pages; remove it or move it to an upsell page.
"Upsell Bad Range" — upsell_mv_tiers has min=5 greater than max=2; swap the values or fix the range.
"Upsell Bad Types" — upsell_mv_tiers requires positive integers for "min" and "max"; got min="1", max=3.
"Upsell Missing Max" — upsell_mv_tiers is missing "max"; declare both as positive integers (e.g. {"min": 1, "max": 5}) or remove the field.
